title: PE23 4AL, Wright Eggs Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/GP3921SL/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Wright Eggs Limited   Installation name: The Poultry Site   Permit number: EPR/GP3921SL/A001   "
